test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Verify health check endpoint returns 200 with status ok

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Create author without required name field returns 422

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag
test_cases.description: Get author detail returns 200 with ETag header

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Get non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match
test_cases.description: Get author with matching If-None-Match header returns 304

test_cases.name: update_author_success
test_cases.description: Update author with partial fields succeeds

test_cases.name: update_author_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Update author with mismatched If-Match header returns 412

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Delete author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_category_success
test_cases.description: Create category with name returns 201

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category
test_cases.description: Create category with duplicate name returns 409

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with 10-13 character ISBN succeeds

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN outside 10-13 range returns 422

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List books with page and page_size parameters returns paginated response

test_cases.name: list_books_with_search_filter
test_cases.description: List books with search parameter filters by title and ISBN

test_cases.name: list_books_with_price_range
test_cases.description: List books with min_price and max_price filters

test_cases.name: get_book_detail_success
test_cases.description: Get book detail returns 200 with full book object including author and category

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Get soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Delete book performs soft delete and returns 204

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book returns 200 with restored book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago succeeds

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published less than 1 year ago returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_invalid_percentage
test_cases.description: Apply discount with percentage outside (0, 50] range returns 422

test_cases.name: increase_stock_success
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity delta succeeds

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Decrease stock below zero returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: upload_cover_valid_jpeg
test_cases.description: Upload JPEG cover image returns 200 with upload details

test_cases.name: upload_cover_invalid_type
test_cases.description: Upload non-JPEG/PNG file returns 415 Unsupported Media Type

test_cases.name: upload_cover_too_large
test_cases.description: Upload cover exceeding 2MB returns 413 Content Too Large
